title: astragalus makuensis
intro: Astragalus makuensis, also known as Maku astragalus, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus makuensis include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Astragalus makuensis is often combined with other herbs and consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture to leverage its medicinal properties.
